title: centranthera siamensis
intro: Centranthera siamensis, also known as Thai balsam, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Centranthera siamensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Centranthera siamensis are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for easy consumption and to harness its medicinal properties.
